Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eclipse]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eclipse is the Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eclipse is a bow that can forge jet-black arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eclipse was the weapon of Mercy's mother from Lowgold to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Eclipse was made from the Remnant of a shadow dragon who became a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy's mother used Eclipse to seal the living volcano of Shara Kahn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy calls the bow Suu.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy uses Eclipse for support.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Eclipse is a location with a dragon's head at its center.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Mercy wields Eclipse.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy holds onto Eclipse for support.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
